text:
On Mon, 3 Aug 2009 12:57:56 +0200, Marcin Wisnicki wrote
> On Mon, Aug 3, 2009 at 11:51, <miwi@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Synopsis: polish/kadu: fix build
> >
> 
> >From what I can see, the only change is addition of "script" to list
> of Qt components.
> It is however not needed according to build instructions of kadu and 
> I have just successfully built it after deinstalling qt4-script.
> 
> Please show your error log.

Are you test it againist qt-4.4.4?
We test it with upcoming qt-4.5.2.

With qt-4.5.2:

Logfile:

http://kde.miwibox.org//errors/8-FreeBSD_amd64/pl-kadu-0.6.5.2_1,1.log

markup of errors in this log:
